message:
fix(db): drop legacy Python FTS triggers on migration to prevent constraint failures

When upgrading from a legacy Python DB, both Python (fts_messages_ai/ad/au)
and Rust (messages_ai/ad/au) FTS triggers coexist on the messages table.
Every INSERT fires both, causing duplicate FTS5 entries and "constraint
failed" errors. Add v2 migration to DROP IF EXISTS the legacy triggers
before creating the Rust ones.

Closes br-2ei.18

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
